subject: Weekly Team Meeting Agenda
body:
Hello Team,

This is to remind you about our weekly meeting scheduled for tomorrow at 11 AM. The key topics for discussion are:

- Review of last week's media interactions
- Planning for upcoming press releases
- Updates on the digital communication strategy

Please come prepared with your updates and inputs.

Best,
Andrew Park

subject: New Social Media Policy
body:
Hello Andrew,

The HR department has released a new Social Media Policy. It is important for all employees, especially those involved in public relations and corporate communications, to be aware of these guidelines.

I will send a copy of the policy to your team and request a quick compliance confirmation.

Best,
Michael Jung

subject: Customer Feedback Analysis
body:
Hi Susan,

I have completed the analysis of the recent customer feedback survey. The results provide interesting insights about our customers' shopping experience, their product preferences, and suggestions for improvement.

I believe this information could be useful for our branding strategy. Let's schedule a meeting to discuss the findings.

Best,
Jason Kim

subject: Q3 Budget Planning
body:
Hello Andrew,

As we are approaching the end of Q2, it's time to start planning for Q3. I would like to review the budget for the Corporate Communications department. Please prepare a detailed proposal highlighting the estimated expenses for different activities and initiatives.

I look forward to your response.

Best,
Richard Lee

subject: Upcoming PR Training Session
body:
Hello Linda,

I have arranged a training session with a leading PR agency for our team. The session will focus on enhancing our media interaction skills and crisis management capabilities. It's scheduled for next Wednesday at 2 PM. Please mark your calendar.

Best,
Andrew Park

subject: Little Grocers school program - PR Update
body:
Dear Team,

I am pleased to share the initial results of our Little Grocers school program launched earlier this year. Our PR team has been actively tracking the media coverage and public sentiment around this initiative.

Looking forward to discussing this in our next meeting.

Best,
Andrew Park

subject: RE: Little Grocers school program - PR Update
body:
Andrew,

This is indeed positive news. Could you please provide a more detailed breakdown about how the Little Grocers program has impacted our brand perception in the community? 

Best,
Emily

subject: RE: Little Grocers school program - PR Update
body:
Emily, Richard,

Of course. We conducted a series of brand sentiment surveys in the participating school districts. The results show a 15% increase in trust and community commitment among parents. This indicates that our Little Grocers program has significantly improved our brand perception in these communities. 

Best,
Andrew
